description: Real-time purchase email notifications with async processing
acceptance_criteria: Complete a purchase flow with valid cart items from seed data.
Verify order confirmation page displays with data-testid='order-confirmed'.
Verify email log entry is created in database with data-testid='email-log-entry'.
Verify email log contains correct order details: order_id, recipient_email, subject.
Verify async processing: checkout completes without waiting for email send (response time < 2s).
Verify email content includes product names, quantities, and total from seed data.
Verify vendor receives notification email when their product is purchased.
Verify email sending failures are logged with data-testid='email-error-log' without blocking user flow.
Verify rate limiting: multiple rapid purchases don't cause duplicate emails.
Verify email preferences: user can opt-out of marketing emails but still receive order confirmations.
